title: Mobile App Development
description: Learn to build cross-platform apps with Flutter. This comprehensive program covers Dart, Flutter widgets, state management, and API integration.

title: Data Science Bootcamp
description: Master data analysis and machine learning. Explore Python, Pandas, Scikit-Learn, and deep learning architectures for real-world predictions.

title: UI/UX Design Essentials
description: Design beautiful and user-friendly interfaces. Learn user research, wireframing, prototyping, and high-fidelity design using industry-standard tools.

title: Backend Engineering
description: Build scalable server-side applications. Focus on Node.js, databases (SQL/NoSQL), security, and system architecture for high-performance systems.
